title: Determination of Lighting Power Density
full_text:
4.3.3.2 Determination of Lighting Power Density
Determination of Lighting Power Density
1) The lighting power density for a space, LPDi, shall be determined using
Table 4.2.1.6.

sentences.text: The lighting power density for a space, LPDi, shall be determined using Table 4.2.1.6.
